> We value architectural coherence over feature quantity. A proposal that cannot be integrated without breaking module boundaries will not be accepted until the architecture can accommodate it cleanly. Please read [ARCHITECTURE.md](../../ARCHITECTURE.md) and [DEVELOPER_GUIDE.md](../../DEVELOPER_GUIDE.md) before submitting.
